scanTypes.markdownDescription:
Scan components to print results for

Controls which phases of the 'compile' pipeline emit results to JSON output. Possible values:   | Value        | Description                                    | |--------------|------------------------------------------------| | sources      | calculate the number of existing source files  | | symbols      | calculate the number of existing symbols files | | scan         | capture symbol values from input files         | | link         | merging output symbols files                   | | pushToGitHub | pushed symbol files                            | (Default: ["link","scan","pushToGitHub"])

progress.markdownDescription:
Report i/o progress to the console

Enables/disables reporting of input files scanned to stdout. (Accepts boolean or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation) (Default: true)
